_note: Lightweight programmatic regression evals. Run via evals/run_programmatic_eval.py (no subagents, no LLM grading). Schema is compatible with skill-creator so fixtures + expectations can be reused by the full eval flow for big-version checkups.

evals.name: example-blockquote-coverage
expectations: pre-build gate (validate_example_blockquote_coverage) reports bare-paragraph example labels

no example label renders as a bare

outside a .phycat-blockquote after build+postprocess
解析 paragraphs render OUTSIDE blockquotes (analysis is never blockquoted)
a media-only figure authored after an example stays OUTSIDE .phycat-blockquote after postprocess

evals.name: svg-cover-injection
expectations: first .sheet is a marked cover (.concept-map-sheet + data-sheet-role=cover)
cover sheet contains an pointing at the injected SVG

evals.name: chapter-h2-pagination
expectations: each chapter-shaped h2 (第N章/节/... and 大招 N) except the first begins a new .sheet
the sheet before each non-first chapter-shaped h2 is marked data-ends-before-lecture=true
ANY h2 (including non-chapter h2 such as 大招总结) marks its predecessor ends-before-lecture — the rule is not confined to chapter-shaped h2

evals.name: h3-pagination-with-frontmatter
expectations: with frontmatter pagination-level: h3, an h3 that follows h2 WITH real body content begins a new .sheet
with frontmatter pagination-level: h3, an h3 that immediately follows an h2 with NO intervening body content does NOT break (titles travel together, parent h2 is not stranded)
without pagination-level frontmatter (default h2), no h3 forces a new .sheet even when it follows body content

evals.name: footer-page-and-breadcrumb
expectations: each non-cover sheet's page label is '第 X / N 页' where N equals the total sheet count
each sheet whose body starts with 第N章 carries that chapter name in its .sheet-trail-label breadcrumb
cover sheet(s) (when present via a cover fixture) have no .sheet-footer

evals.name: orphan-heading-pagination
expectations: no non-cover, non-final sheet's last flow-block is a heading (anti-orphan: the trailing heading traveled to the next sheet)
validate_sheet_bottom_margin passes on the orphan fixture (the repair prevented the defect, nothing left to flag)
